_comment: The frozen compat core (frozen L0 spec 03 §3.1/§5). Generated-once, hand-ratified. SEED STATE: carries the reserved-prefix owner map (net-new vs shipped is_reserved_capability, spec 03 §3.2) and the three reserved capability prefixes as legacy entries with owners. The full Stage-2 harvest (43 subsystem keys, verbatim legacy custom_ids, settings-key vocab, capability strings, actor types, event names) is produced by tools/compute_corpus.py at Stage-2 (spec 03 §11) and appended here for hand-ratification.
